Package org.eventb.internal.ui.proofinformation

Class ProofInformationPage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.ui.part.Page
org.eventb.internal.ui.proofinformation.ProofInformationPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.ui.part.IPage, org.eclipse.ui.part.IPageBookViewPage, IUserSupportManagerChangedListener, IProofInformationPage
public class ProofInformationPage extends org.eclipse.ui.part.Page implements IProofInformationPage, IUserSupportManagerChangedListener
This class is an implementation of a Proof Control 'page'.
